capture_note: S1-S4 were already implemented and uncommitted in the working tree at the start of this story's session, and this story's brief went directly to implementation. pre_existing_failures.decision: Recorded, not blocking — identical debt already tolerated across S1-S4 of this epic through the same baseline.
